newsSince: No genuinely new fundamental evidence in the June 9-23 window. The ACHIEVE Phase 3 readouts (oral orforglipron/Foundayo beating oral semaglutide on A1C and weight in T2D) were announced June 8 and were already credited in the June 9 prior case. Foundayo obesity approval dates to April 1. Stock fell ~3.55% on the day with YTD only +2.19%.

sources.label: Lilly ACHIEVE Phase 3 orforglipron T2D results (PR Newswire)
FDA approves Lilly Foundayo (orforglipron) oral GLP-1 (Lilly IR)

verdicts.rankRationale: Silicon-consumption-vs-human-goods lens: LLY is the human/pharma-consumption proxy. The June 8 ACHIEVE data was already captured in the June 9 case; no new evidence after June 9. On this alpha-weighted page LLY remains the definition of consensus ($984B cap, fully owned), so rank 8 holds with no further drift.
verdicts.bull: Best-in-class oral+injectable GLP-1 franchise; durable human-consumption demand proxy.
verdicts.neutral: Defensive consumption proxy but consensus and mature; low hidden alpha.
verdicts.bear: ~$1T cap, fully institutionally owned; flat YTD reflects expectations already high.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Oral GLP-1 commercial ramp (Foundayo) and label expansions.
verdicts.primaryRisk: GLP-1 pricing/competition; valuation leaves little surprise upside.
